reviews.review_description: Hello owner Of monkey run Can you join your game I want to ask you a question.

reviews.review_title: Rlly good game and creator! DOWNLOAD IT
reviews.review_description: When I started to play I noticed a lot of things, some good some bad, the thing I like about lucky ducks is how unique and different it is from every other game like this, whenever there’s issues the creator fixes them which I can respect. Rlly good game with the experience I had in it

So when I first got the game it was called monkey runners and I was making a vid of gtag Knockoffs and I went to the lava Parkour. 5/10. I then went to the shop. 7/10. Next zero gravity aka space. 10/10. I come back about 1 month later. The game was now called happy monkes I thought "I don't remember downloading this game" until I got in and realized that it was monkey runners. I then saw it. Horror. Now horror is kinda scary I have no idea how to beat it the jumpscare alone gets a. 6.9/10. But there is still one  singular  thing about the jumpscare. 



It kicks you out of the game meaning you have to restart the game over and over again please fix this but horror. 4.20. So overall game is a 18/♾️
Just looking at the fotos, it looks good as if it just released

developer_response.body: the photos are outdated. if you play the game it is way better than the screenshots
